name: Possessed Dummy
text: Play this card when your opponent sends a creature to their cemetery. Summon that creature as your Limited Summon. If this card or your primary creature is removed from the field, or this effect is negated, return it to their cemetery.

condition.text: Play this card when your opponent sends a creature to their cemetery. Summon that creature as your Limited Summon. If this card or your primary creature is removed from the field, or this effect is negated, return it to their cemetery.
